Description:
A faded map revealing the location of an unknown treasure.

※Level 90 full party (8 players) recommended.

A faded map revealing the location of a teleportation portal leading to a hidden stage filled with untold riches.

※Level 90 full party (8 players) recommended.
守護天節を楽しむための、みんな大好きな甘ァいお菓子
A small sack nearly full to bursting with delectably sweet pumpkin cookies.
園芸師ギルドが愛情たっぷりに育てた、守護天節の飾りにちょうどいい大きさのパンプキン
Lovingly raised and hand-carved by Greatloam Growery's botanists, this plump, smiling gourd is a staple of the All Saints' Wake season.
An empty liquor bottle of a kind commonly seen throughout Shaaloani.
A sack of produce likely to be that which the fugitive stole from Luwateninyawawsa.
A piece of paper bearing what appears to be diary entries written by the fugitive.
A mix of rock salt and other local ingredients used to prevent the accumulation of ice and snow on Yok Huy stonework.
Finely ground minerals used to buff scratches from crystalline surfaces.
A vibrant flower used by brewers at Zirgorteh the Open-armed in the production of a corn-based beverage.
A stone found at high altitudes inscribed with glyphs. The Chirwagur seem to consider it a protective talisman.
An icicle of frozen spring water, freshly harvested from the high larder.
A set of construction supplies required for the restoration of Zirgorteh the Open-armed.
An exceptionally pure glowstone required for the restoration of Zirgorteh the Open-armed.
An alcoholic drink made with fermented corn. Said to be a favorite of Urqopacha's snow spirits, a few tipples of this will quell the rage which burgeons in their hearts.
